meta.title: London & Paris 2026
meta.description: 10-day family adventure through London, Paris, and Disneyland Paris.

bookings.label: British Airways · Round Trip
bookings.detail: Outbound: Jun 7 · BA220 · STL→LHR 22:00→12:05+1 | Return: Jun 16 · BA221 · LHR→STL 16:25→19:30

bookings.label: Eurostar · London ↔ Paris Round Trip
bookings.notes: Kenna API is BLOCKED — passport pending. Louise API completed.

bookings.label: Travelodge London Kings Cross Royal Scot
bookings.detail: Jun 8–13 (5 nights). Check-in from noon (early check-in). Breakfast included. WiFi: TVLRTFRPK
bookings.notes: Breakfast included all 5 mornings. WiFi code: TVLRTFRPK.

bookings.label: Dream Castle Hotel (Disney Partner)
bookings.paidWith: Capital One Venture X $300 travel credit

bookings.label: Disney Hotel New York — Art of Marvel (Night 1)
bookings.detail: Jun 14. Superior, 2 Large Double, Garden View. Hotel + tickets + meals.
bookings.notes: Full-board Extra Plus meal plan included. Call +33 1 60 30 60 53 to link rooms for both nights.

bookings.label: Disney Hotel New York — Art of Marvel (Night 2)
bookings.detail: Jun 15. Superior, 2 Large Double, Garden View.
bookings.notes: Request same room as Night 1 at check-in.

bookings.label: Matilda the Musical
bookings.detail: Cambridge Theatre · Dress Circle Row A · Seats 23-26

bookings.label: Bistrot Chez Rémy
bookings.detail: Table service — starter + main + dessert + soft drink (kids). Meal voucher 1.

bookings.label: PYM Kitchen
bookings.detail: All-you-can-eat buffet + soft drink. Meal voucher 2.
bookings.notes: Go back for seconds — best calorie-per-voucher value.

bookings.label: Royal Banquet (character dining)
bookings.detail: Princess character dining — starter + main + dessert. Expect Anna, Elsa, Rapunzel, Cinderella, Aurora. Allow 75-90 min.
bookings.notes: Inside the Disneyland Hotel (castle building above park entrance). Exit park to reach it.

events.text: ⏰ ALARM: Jun 6 at 9:55 PM — BA check-in opens for FREE seat selection!
BA220 · STL → LHR · World Traveller
Overnight flight — arrives June 8 at 12:05 PM (Terminal 5)

items.text: Final packing check: passports for all 4 (including Louise, age 5)
Charge all devices, download offline entertainment for overnight flight
Pack carry-on essentials: snacks, change of clothes, toothbrush — you land midday and go straight to the hotel
Light dinner before heading to airport. Aim to arrive STL by 7:30 PM (2.5 hrs before)
Kids' iPads loaded + headphones packed for 8-hr overnight flight
SET ALARM: Jun 6 at 9:55 PM CDT. BA online check-in opens at exactly 10:00 PM CDT (24 hrs before 10 PM Jun 7 departure). This is your FREE seat selection window!
Both Michael and Meghan: log in simultaneously on separate devices at ba.com → Manage My Booking → YUAD5K. Select seats for all 4 passengers the instant they appear
Target a row of 3 (A-B-C or H-J-K) for Michael+Kenna+Louise, with Meghan in the middle section same row (D-E-F). Or grab any 4 adjacent seats

If free seats don't put you together, DO NOT PAY. At the airport check-in desk, say: "We have a 5-year-old who needs to be seated next to a parent." UK CAA guidance requires airlines to seat children under 12 with an accompanying adult at no charge. Gate agents handle this daily
Check back at 12 hrs, 6 hrs, and 2 hrs before departure — seats shuffle as others check in, cancel, or upgrade
BA220 · STL → LHR · Departs 22:00, arrives 12:05+1 · Terminal 5
World Traveller (economy). Booking ref: YUAD5K
Paid with 260,000 Avios + $1,083.86 in taxes/fees
Flight is ~8 hours. Meal service included. Try to sleep — you land midday and need to power through Day 1
UK ETA required for all 4 passengers — must be approved BEFORE boarding. Apply well in advance!
BA Advance Passenger Info must be completed on ba.com → Manage My Booking → YUAD5K
Overnight flight with a 5-year-old: bring comfort items, tablet loaded with shows, noise-canceling if possible

events.text: Arrive LHR Terminal 5. Early check-in booked from 12pm!
🚄 Heathrow Express → Paddington (15 min)
Tube to Kings Cross. Check into Travelodge
WiFi code: TVLRTFRPK · Breakfast included all 5 mornings
Explore Coal Drops Yard / St Pancras area
Early dinner — Dishoom or Pizza Union

items.text: Have UK ETA confirmation accessible on phone for each passenger
Brush teeth, wash face before landing — you'll want to feel somewhat fresh
Have hotel address ready: Travelodge London Kings Cross Royal Scot
Immigration at T5 — can take 30-60 min. E-gates may work for US adults with ETA; kids under 12 use staffed desks
Heathrow Express: Pre-booked (ref 69d52862). Platform in T5 basement level. 15 min to Paddington
Paddington → Kings Cross: Hammersmith & City or Circle line → Kings Cross St Pancras (~20 min). Use contactless payment
Travelodge: Early check-in available from noon! Walk from Kings Cross station ~5 min
Jet lag will hit HARD, especially Louise. Power through until 7-8 PM local time to reset body clocks
Don't over-plan Day 1. Coal Drops Yard is a 5-min walk — perfect low-key exploring
Contactless payment works everywhere in London (Tube, buses, shops). No cash needed
Louise might crash mid-afternoon. Have a stroller or be ready for a hotel nap break
Travelodge WiFi code: TVLRTFRPK. Breakfast included all 5 mornings
Coal Drops Yard has great kid-friendly restaurants (Pizza Pilgrims, Barrafina)
St Pancras station next door has beautiful architecture — worth a peek even on arrival day
Kenna Oyster card: Buy at Paddington or Kings Cross Tube station (£7). Ask staff to add Young Visitor discount (50% off, 14 days). Kenna must be present. Louise rides free everywhere as under-11
Adults + transport: Apple Pay on your iPhones works on all London transport (Tube, buses, Thames Clipper). Just tap at the yellow readers. Auto-caps at daily rate. No Oyster card needed for adults

events.text: Big Ben, Westminster Abbey
St James's Park playground (Louise)
Walk to Buckingham Palace
Walk back to South Bank. Quick lunch
🎡 London Eye (30 min ride)
Walk to London Eye Pier → Thames Clipper boat ride
Explore South Bank
Dinner at Southbank Centre Food Market

items.text: First breakfast at Travelodge — check time/location at front desk
Save London Eye e-ticket on phone (Order #601617735). Screenshot as backup
Check weather — this is a heavily outdoor day (Westminster, parks, river)
Pack layers, rain jackets, comfy walking shoes — BIG walking day
Travelodge → Westminster: Tube from Kings Cross (Northern or Victoria line). ~15 min
Thames Clipper: Buy tickets at pier (Oyster/contactless works). Runs every 20 min
All walking between Westminster, St James's Park, Buckingham Palace, and South Bank is doable (~25 min stretches)
London Eye at 1:00 PM is a FIXED time. Work backwards from this — don't linger at Buckingham Palace
Changing of the Guard only happens certain days — check online. Huge crowds if it's on
South Bank can be overwhelming with 2 kids. Pick a focused stretch near London Eye rather than walking end to end
St James's Park playground is excellent for Louise — perfect mid-morning energy burn
Southbank Centre Food Market (Fri-Sun) has great diverse food at reasonable prices
Thames Clipper is both transport AND sightseeing — great for tired legs after the Eye

events.text: Morning: Covent Garden shops + street performers
Head to V&A Museum (Tube to South Kensington)
👗 V&A Fashion Tour (45 min)
Tube: South Kensington → Leicester Square (~15 min)
Arrive Cambridge Theatre — 25 min buffer ⚠️
🎭 Matilda the Musical · Dress Circle Row A · Seats 23-26
Show ends
Dinner in Covent Garden or Chinatown

items.text: Download Matilda e-tickets to phone. Ref: 26042Q-6YAMRCW8CJ
Cambridge Theatre, Seven Dials (Covent Garden area). Dress Circle Row A, Seats 23-26
Book V&A Fashion Tour if not done yet (vam.ac.uk, 12:30 PM slot)
Plan the tight transfer: V&A → Matilda has only a 25 min buffer
Kings Cross → Covent Garden: Piccadilly line, ~10 min
Covent Garden → V&A (South Kensington): Piccadilly line, ~10 min
V&A → Cambridge Theatre: Tube South Ken → Leicester Square (Piccadilly, ~12 min) + 5 min walk
⏱ TIGHT TRANSFER: V&A tour ends ~1:15 PM. Matilda curtain is 2:00 PM sharp. Only ~45 min door-to-door with Tube. If tour runs over, you're sprinting
Contingency: If running late, skip Tube and taxi V&A → Cambridge Theatre (~15 min, ~£12)
Alternative: Drop V&A tour entirely. Museum is free to explore casually instead — zero stress
Matilda is 2 hrs 40 min. Louise (age 5) needs to sit through the whole show — bring a quiet snack
Covent Garden street performers are free and kids love them — perfect morning entertainment
Dress Circle Row A is phenomenal — front of the upper level with full unobstructed stage view
Post-show: you're in Seven Dials/Covent Garden. Chinatown is a 5-min walk for dinner

events.text: British Museum (mummies, Greek marbles)
Regent's Park playgrounds / pedal boats
Dinner near Kings Cross

items.text: Flex day — no fixed bookings! Sleep in if jet lag is still lingering
British Museum is free, no timed entry needed. Opens 10 AM
Kings Cross → British Museum: 20 min walk through Bloomsbury, or Tube 1 stop to Russell Square
British Museum → Regent's Park: 15 min walk north
British Museum is ENORMOUS. Don't try to see everything. Pick 2-3 highlights: Egyptian mummies, Rosetta Stone, Greek marbles
Museum fatigue is real with kids. 2 hours max, then get outside to Regent's Park
Regent's Park has fantastic playgrounds and pedal boats on the boating lake
This is your buffer/recovery day. If something from earlier was missed, today is the makeup day
Close to hotel — easy to pop back for an afternoon rest if Louise needs it

events.text: 👨‍👧 Michael + Louise: Natural History Museum
👩‍👧 Meghan + Kenna: Tate Modern + Millennium Bridge
Regroup for lunch or afternoon
Optional: Sky Garden (free, book 3 wks ahead)
⚠ Pack tonight — 5:15 AM wake-up tomorrow!

items.text: Confirm Natural History Museum timed entry (nhm.ac.uk)
Confirm Sky Garden booking if secured (booked May 25)
⚠️ SET ALARM FOR 5:15 AM TOMORROW! Pack bags for Paris TONIGHT
Print/save Eurostar tickets. Ref: QRXPZK. Check-in opens 45 min before departure
Lay out tomorrow's clothes. Bags by the door. Everyone in bed by 9 PM
Split day: Decide morning meeting point for Michael+Louise and Meghan+Kenna
NHM: Tube to South Kensington (Piccadilly line, ~15 min from Kings Cross)
Tate Modern: Tube to Southwark or St Paul's + walk across Millennium Bridge
CRITICAL: Pack for Paris tonight. You will NOT have time tomorrow morning — Eurostar departs 6:31 AM
Eurostar API must be completed for Kenna and Louise before departure. Do this NOW if not done
Early dinner tonight. Everyone in bed by 9 PM — tomorrow is brutal
NHM dinosaur gallery is the highlight for Louise. Blue whale in Hintze Hall is jaw-dropping
Tate Modern is free. Kenna (12) may enjoy the immersive installations on upper floors
Sky Garden is free — 360° views from the 35th floor of the Walkie Talkie building

events.text: Wake up. Walk to St Pancras (5 min)
🚄 Eurostar 9002 · Coach 10 · Seats 18,17,13,14
Arrive Paris Gare du Nord
Metro to Trocadéro → Eiffel Tower!
Lunch near Eiffel Tower
Metro → RER A to Marne-la-Vallée (~1 hr)
Check into Dream Castle Hotel
Kids: castle pool & water slide! Evening: Disney Village

items.text: Bags packed by door. Alarm 5:15 AM. Clothes laid out
Eurostar tickets on phone. Ref: QRXPZK. Train 9002, Coach 10, Seats 18/17/13/14
Travelodge is 5-min walk to St Pancras — leave hotel by 5:30 AM latest
No hotel breakfast (too early). Grab pastries at St Pancras or eat on Eurostar
Leg 1: Walk to St Pancras (5 min). Check-in opens 5:46 AM. Gates close 6:01 AM. Be there 5:45
Leg 2: Eurostar 9002 · 06:31→09:57 Paris Gare du Nord. Security + UK exit + French entry checks before boarding
Leg 3: Gare du Nord → Trocadéro: Metro Line 4 → Line 6 (or Line 9). ~30 min
Leg 4: Eiffel Tower area → Disney: Metro to Châtelet, RER A to Marne-la-Vallée/Chessy. ~1 hour. ~€5/person
Dream Castle shuttle: Free from Disney bus station. Runs ~every 20 min
5:15 AM alarm with a 5-year-old. Have Louise's clothes and a snack ready to go

Eiffel Tower lift tickets go on sale exactly 60 days ahead at MIDNIGHT Paris time. For Jun 13 visit → tickets drop at 5:00 PM CDT on April 13 (midnight CEST = UTC+2). Be on ticket.toureiffel.paris refreshing at 4:55 PM!
Summit sells out within MINUTES in summer. If midnight batch sells out, a second batch often drops at 4:45 AM Paris time = 9:45 PM CDT April 13
Create your account on ticket.toureiffel.paris NOW so you're ready to buy instantly on April 13
If you miss both windows, Trocadéro viewpoint is still an amazing free photo op — and on-site tickets are sometimes available day-of with a longer wait
RER A to Disney: Validate your tickets! Fine for no validation is €50+
Watch belongings on Paris metro — tourist areas are pickpocket-heavy
Eurostar has a bar car — coffee and pastries once onboard
Dream Castle pool has a water slide! Let the kids burn energy after travel
Disney Village is walkable — good for dinner without park tickets

Eiffel Tower tickets: Must be purchased April 13 at 5:00 PM CDT (midnight Paris, 60 days out). Summit by elevator is the goal. All 4 need tickets (Louise is 5 — child rate, not free). Official site only: ticket.toureiffel.paris

events.text: Check out Dream Castle. Shuttle/walk to Art of Marvel.
Early check-in at Art of Marvel — get MagicPass + Easy Pass (room not ready until 3 PM)
Head to Disney Adventure World entrance (10-min walk)
⭐ EXTRA MAGIC TIME — early access! (Art of Marvel arrival day = eligible)
All 4 together: Crush's Coaster (Louise clears 107cm!), Spider-Man W.E.B., then split for Avengers Assemble
Park opens to public. Crowds arrive — switch to lower-wait rides
Ratatouille (refurbished — now 2D!), Frozen Ever After, Raiponce Tangled Spin, Tower of Terror
🍽️ Lunch: Bistrot Chez Rémy — meal voucher 1
Continue rides. Use SNACK+DRINK voucher mid-afternoon (Pause Gourmande)
Room ready — drop bags at Art of Marvel
🍽️ Dinner: PYM Kitchen — meal voucher 2
Evening rides + explore Adventure Way gardens (new! Toy Story, Tangled themes)
✨ Disney Cascade of Lights — NEW nighttime lake show (drones, fireworks, water projections!)
Disney Adventure World closes (est. June hours)
🍸 Skyline Bar at Art of Marvel — use DRINK VOUCHER (cocktails/mocktails!)
🎟️ All meals + drinks today covered by Full-board Extra Plus (4 vouchers used)

items.text: Set alarm 6:30 AM. Pack day bag: chargers, sunscreen, snacks, rain layer
Download Disneyland Paris app. Link booking #32984124 to Disney Account
Ensure MagicPass and meal vouchers are accessible in app (mobile check-in opens Jun 7)
Charge phones to 100% — app-heavy day (wait times, dining, Premier Access)
Bring a portable battery pack!
Dream Castle → Art of Marvel: ~10-15 min shuttle or walk through Disney Village
Art of Marvel → Disney Adventure World entrance: ~10 min walk. Security opens ~30 min before EMT
Show MagicPass/Easy Pass at EMT entrance. Get it at Art of Marvel early check-in desk first

At check-in: Request same room for both nights. Tell front desk you have booking #32984124 (Jun 14) and #H-DKH4WQD368V2 (Jun 15) — ask them to assign the same room. This is the most reliable way to get it done
Dream Castle checkout: Don't wait until 11 AM! Check out ~7:00 to maximize EMT
Art of Marvel early check-in gets your MagicPass, but room isn't ready until 3 PM. Leave bags at hotel luggage storage
Louise (est. 115cm in June) CLEARS Crush's Coaster (107cm), Big Thunder Mountain (102cm), and Tower of Terror (102cm)!
Louise CANNOT ride: Avengers Assemble: Flight Force (120cm), Hyperspace Mountain (120cm), Indiana Jones (140cm) — use Parent Swap for these 3
Bistrot Chez Rémy at 11:45 AM is FIXED. Set phone alarm — easy to lose track on rides
PYM Kitchen at 6:00 PM — same. Don't queue for a ride at 5:30 thinking you'll make it

EMT Strategy (8:00–9:30): ALL FOUR → Crush's Coaster first (Louise clears 107cm!). Then Spider-Man W.E.B. Adventure (no req). Then split: Michael+Kenna → Avengers Assemble (120cm, Parent Swap for Meghan) while Meghan+Louise → Frozen Ever After or Ratatouille

Post-9:30: Tower of Terror (Louise clears 102cm! — new covered queue area makes the wait more bearable), Cars Road Trip, Ratatouille (refurbished 2026 — now 2D, new Parisian artist studio queue scene, enhanced props)

NEW World of Frozen (opened Mar 29): Frozen Ever After (boat ride through Arendelle — expect long waits even in June!), Royal Encounter with Anna & Elsa in Arendelle Castle (meet & greet — check app for Virtual Queue), "A Celebration in Arendelle" daytime show on Viking longships in Arendelle Bay. Louise will be mesmerized

NEW Adventure Way (opened Mar 29): Raiponce Tangled Spin (spinner ride under glowing lanterns — Louise's new favorite!), themed gardens (Toy Story, Tangled, British), Regal View Restaurant & Lounge (Princess character dining — first in-park bar at DLP!), new Mickey & Minnie meet and greet

NEW Disney Cascade of Lights (~8:30-9:00 PM): Brand-new nighttime lake show on Adventure Bay — fireworks, water-screen projections, drones, and aquatic drones. Don't miss this! It's the Adventure World equivalent of Illuminations
Avengers Assemble: Flight Force (120cm): Louise can't ride. Parent Swap — one adult rides with Kenna, then swaps. Free!
Standby Pass (FREE!): Reserve free return-time slots in the app. Only hold 1 at a time. Combine with Premier Access for max efficiency
Single Rider: Available on Crush's Coaster, Ratatouille, RC Racer. Great for a quick re-ride
Louise highlights: Frozen Ever After (boat ride!), Raiponce Tangled Spin (lanterns!), Ratatouille, Cars Road Trip, A Celebration in Arendelle show, Anna & Elsa meet and greet
Skip Premier Access Ultimate (~€120-160/person in June high season). With EMT + 2 full days, you have time for standby
Buy 1-2 Premier Access One strategically (~€8-18/ride, purchased in-app once inside park):
#1: Frozen Ever After — brand new ride, will have the longest waits. All 4 can ride. Best PA One value today
#2: Ratatouille — if standby hits 60+ min midday. All 4 can ride. Buy while queuing for something else
Skip PA for: Cars Road Trip (short waits), Tower of Terror (preshow means PA still takes 15-20 min)
Parent Swap (free!): Only needed for Avengers Assemble: Flight Force (120cm). One adult rides with Kenna, then the other swaps — no re-queuing
Max 3 PA One per person per day. Budget: 2 passes × 4 riders × ~€12 = ~€96 (~$105)
No breakfast voucher today — you slept at Dream Castle (not covered by meal plan)
11:45 AM — Bistrot Chez Rémy → MEAL VOUCHER 1. Table service = starter + main + dessert + soft drink (kids). Order all 3 courses — they're included, don't skip any!
~3:00 PM — Pause Gourmande → SNACK + DRINK VOUCHER. Pastry + hot/cold drink at any quick-service. Perfect mid-ride fuel. Don't waste this at breakfast!
6:00 PM — PYM Kitchen → MEAL VOUCHER 2. All-you-can-eat buffet + soft drink. Go back for seconds — best calorie-per-voucher value

~9:00 PM — Skyline Bar (Art of Marvel) → DRINK VOUCHER. 1 alcoholic OR non-alcoholic drink per person. Cocktails run €12-16 — high-value use! Michael & Meghan: cocktails. Kenna & Louise: mocktails/milkshakes
Excluded restaurants: Starbucks, McDonald's, Rainforest Café, Five Guys, Earl of Sandwich, Vapiano, The Royal Pub, Brasserie Rosalie — vouchers NOT accepted
$0 out of pocket for all food + drinks today

events.text: 🍽️ Breakfast at Art of Marvel — BREAKFAST VOUCHER (only included breakfast of trip)
Head to Disneyland Park entrance (10-min walk)
⭐ EXTRA MAGIC TIME — early access! (Art of Marvel guest)
All 4 → Big Thunder Mountain. Then split: Hyperspace Mtn (Parent Swap) + Peter Pan (walk-on!)
Park opens to public. Crowds arrive — switch to lower-wait rides
🍽️ Lunch: Royal Banquet — LAST DAY VOUCHER + character dining 👸
Afternoon: Pirates of the Caribbean, Phantom Manor, Peter Pan's Flight
Disney Stars on Parade (est. time — check app on the day)
⏰ BA RETURN CHECK-IN OPENS — grab free seats on phone NOW!
🍽️ Dinner: Quick-service (NO voucher left — ~€40-60 out of pocket)
Stay in Art of Marvel (same room)
✨ Disney Illuminations fireworks at Sleeping Beauty Castle!
Disneyland Park closes (est. June hours). Walk back to hotel.
⚠ Pack tonight — 7:30 AM checkout tomorrow!

items.text: Set alarm 6:15 AM. Breakfast opens early — be there by 7:00 to eat and still make EMT
Check parade and show times in app tonight. Plan around Disney Stars on Parade + Illuminations
Charge phones again. Another full app-heavy day
Royal Banquet at 12:30 is at the DISNEYLAND HOTEL (not your hotel). Know the walking route — allow 15 min

SET ALARM: Jun 15 at 5:20 PM Paris time (10:20 AM CDT). BA return check-in opens at exactly 5:25 PM CEST (24 hrs before 4:25 PM BST Jun 16 departure). You'll be in Disneyland Park — do this from your phone during a break!
Same strategy: both log in on separate phones at ba.com → YUAD5K. Grab 4 adjacent seats instantly
If free seats don't work, handle at Heathrow T5 check-in desk on Jun 16 — same "5-year-old must sit with parent" rule applies
Good time to do this: right before or after Disney Stars on Parade (~2:30-3:00 PM park time). Take 5 min, grab seats, get back to the magic
Art of Marvel → Disneyland Park entrance: ~10 min walk through Disney Village
Security checkpoint opens ~30 min before EMT (~7:30 AM)
Royal Banquet: Inside the Disneyland Hotel (castle building above park entrance). Exit park → walk through hotel lobby → restaurant. Allow 15 min each way
Royal Banquet at 12:30 is OUTSIDE the park (in Disneyland Hotel). Exit and re-enter. Allow 15 min each way
Character dining takes ~75-90 min with princesses visiting tables. Don't rush — this is a highlight for the kids
Peter Pan's Flight: Consistently longest waits (60-90 min). Hit it during EMT (Meghan+Louise while Michael+Kenna do Hyperspace Mountain) or buy PA One
Disney Illuminations at ~10 PM. Louise will be exhausted after 14+ hours. Consider a stroller
⚠️ PACK TONIGHT! 7:30 AM checkout tomorrow. You will NOT have time in the morning

EMT Strategy (8:00–9:30): ALL FOUR → Big Thunder Mountain first (Louise clears 102cm!). Then split: Michael+Kenna → Hyperspace Mountain (120cm, Parent Swap for Meghan) while Meghan+Louise → Peter Pan's Flight (no req, walk-on during EMT!)
Post-9:30: Pirates of the Caribbean, Phantom Manor, Buzz Lightyear (all family-friendly, all 4 ride together)
After Royal Banquet (~2 PM): It's a Small World, Alice's Curious Labyrinth (walkthrough — Louise will love it, no wait), Dumbo, Mad Hatter's Tea Cups
Parent Swap rides (120cm+): Hyperspace Mountain only. Indiana Jones (140cm) — Kenna only, both adults swap. That's it — Louise rides almost everything else!
Parade Strategy (~2:30-3:00 PM): Disney Stars on Parade is spectacular. Watch from Main Street or Central Plaza. OR skip and ride headliners with shorter queues during the parade
Evening (7-10 PM): Re-ride favorites. Queues drop significantly after dinner. Fantasyland rides nearly walk-on after 8 PM
10:00 PM: Disney Illuminations at Sleeping Beauty Castle. Claim a spot in the hub 20-30 min early. Front-center gives the best view
Single Rider: Big Thunder Mountain and Ratatouille both have it. Great for a quick re-ride
Best PA One targets for Disneyland Park today:
#1: Peter Pan's Flight — perpetually 60-90 min waits. Only ~€8-12. All 4 can ride. Best value PA in either park
#2: Big Thunder Mountain — if you want a re-ride and it's 45+ min midday. All 4 can ride (Louise clears 102cm)
Skip PA for: Phantom Manor (rarely 25+ min), Pirates (walk-on after 5 PM), Buzz (moderate waits)
Parent Swap only needed for 2 rides today: Hyperspace Mountain (120cm) and Indiana Jones (140cm, Kenna only). That's it!
Estimated PA One spend: 2 passes × 4 riders × ~€10 avg = ~€80 (~$87)
~7:00 AM — Art of Marvel buffet → BREAKFAST VOUCHER. Eat well — this is your only included breakfast. Hot + cold buffet, pastries, eggs, the works

12:30 PM — Royal Banquet → LAST DAY VOUCHER + CHARACTER DINING. Princess dining! The character meal REPLACES a regular voucher (not extra). Starter + main + dessert. Expect Anna, Elsa, Rapunzel, Cinderella, Aurora visiting your table. Allow 75-90 min

~6:00-7:00 PM — Dinner: NO VOUCHER LEFT. All 6 vouchers are spent. Budget ~€40-60 out of pocket for the family. Options: quick-service in Disneyland Park (~€12-15/person), or a crêpe/snack — you'll have had a massive Royal Banquet lunch
Snack + Drink vouchers were used yesterday. You get 1 set per night, and your plan only covers 1 night
Strategy: Royal Banquet will be a huge multi-course meal with characters at 12:30. You probably won't be hungry again until 6-7 PM. A lighter quick-service dinner keeps costs down

events.text: 🍽️ Breakfast NOT included (C1 booking). Grab pastries at station (~€15-20)
Check out. RER A → Châtelet → RER B → Gare du Nord
Arrive Gare du Nord. Eurostar check-in
🚄 Eurostar 9023 · Coach 4 · Seats 53,54,58,57
Arrive London St Pancras
Walk/Tube to Paddington (~15 min)
🚄 Heathrow Express (15 min)
Arrive Heathrow T5 — 3 hr 10 min buffer ✅
✈ BA221 · LHR → STL
Arrive St. Louis! Welcome home 🏠

items.text: PACK EVERYTHING after Illuminations tonight. Checkout is 7:30 AM
Set alarm 6:30 AM

Breakfast NOT included tomorrow — Night 2 is Capital One (no meal plan). Options: pay for hotel buffet (~€82 for family of 4) or grab pastries at Marne-la-Vallée station or Gare du Nord (much cheaper, ~€15-20 total)
Eurostar return on phone. Ref: QRXPZK. Train 9023, Coach 4, Seats 53/54/58/57
Heathrow Express on phone. Ref: c44d65da
Leg 1: Art of Marvel → Marne-la-Vallée station (~15 min walk). RER A → Châtelet-Les Halles. RER B → Gare du Nord. Total ~50-60 min. ~€5/person
Leg 2: Eurostar 9023 departs 11:02 AM. Check-in ~10:15. Be at Gare du Nord by 10:00 AM latest
Leg 3: Arrive St Pancras 12:30 (UK time — gain 1 hour). Walk/Tube to Paddington (~15 min)
Leg 4: Heathrow Express from Paddington ~13:00. 15 min to T5. Ref: c44d65da
Leg 5: BA221 departs 16:25 → STL 19:30. Arrive T5 ~13:15 = 3 hr 10 min buffer
RER connections can be confusing at Châtelet. Follow signs for RER B direction "Aéroport Charles de Gaulle"
RER B runs every ~10-15 min. If you miss one, you're fine — plenty of buffer
Gare du Nord Eurostar terminal is separate from main station. Follow "Eurostar" signs
Time zone change: France → UK loses 1 hour. Depart 11:02 Paris, arrive 12:30 London (feels like 28 min!)
If ANY leg is delayed, you still have 3+ hours buffer at Heathrow. Don't panic
Buy RER tickets at Marne-la-Vallée machines (cards accepted). Keep them — scan OUT at Gare du Nord
Eurostar bar car: final French croissant opportunity
Heathrow T5 duty-free is excellent for last-minute gifts. Budget time for it with 3+ hr buffer
BA221 arrives STL 19:30. Home for a late dinner. Trip complete!

budget.savingsNote: 260K Avios (~$4,000+ value) + 64,795 C1 miles ($648) + $300 Venture X credit = ~$4,948+ total savings

checklist.text: Apply for Global Entry — Michael + Meghan — Apply at ttp.dhs.gov. $120/person — fully reimbursed by Venture X. Kids apply FREE once your apps are pending. All 4 can do Enrollment on Arrival at STL on Jun 16 if conditionally approved. Includes TSA PreCheck for outbound.

Apply for Global Entry — Kenna + Louise (after adults) — Free for minors when parent's application is pending or approved. Same site: ttp.dhs.gov. Parent must consent + attend interview with each child.
Buy 3-4 Anker Nano Travel Adapters (5-in-1, 20W) — anker.com/products/a9215. Covers US/UK/EU/AU plugs with USB-C port. ~$16 each. One per person or per charging station.

Check T-Mobile plan details with Meghan — Find out exact plan name (Go5G, Magenta MAX, Experience More/Beyond, etc.). This determines if you get 5GB or 15GB free high-speed data in UK+France. May not need a separate eSIM at all.
⚠️ Kenna's passport — follow up on hiccup — Application requires a copy of Tyler's (Meghan's ex-husband) ID. Follow up on status — this is a BLOCKER for Eurostar API, UK ETA, and travel.

🗼 Eiffel Tower — Apr 13 at 5:00 PM CDT! — Lift tickets drop at midnight Paris time (60 days ahead). ticket.toureiffel.paris. Summit sells out in MINUTES. Backup batch at 9:45 PM CDT. Create account NOW.
UK ETA — all 4 passengers — gov.uk/apply-electronic-travel-authorisation. £10/person. Apply once all passports are in hand. Takes a few days to process.
Eurostar API for Kenna Holland — eurostar.com → Manage Booking → QRXPZK. BLOCKED until passport arrives.
BA Advance Passenger Info — all 4 — ba.com → Manage My Booking → YUAD5K. Passport + contact details for each passenger.
BA seat selection — check if needed — Manage My Booking → YUAD5K. Check if seats are assigned. BA charges ~$25-50/seat in economy but worth it to sit together with 2 kids on an 8-hr overnight flight.
Notify Capital One (Venture X) of travel — Set travel notifications for UK and France, June 7-16. Prevents fraud blocks on international purchases. No foreign transaction fees on Venture X.

Data plan decision — T-Mobile vs. eSIM — Once you know your T-Mobile plan tier: if 5-15GB included is enough, just enable data roaming. If not, add T-Mobile 30-Day International Pass ($50/15GB/line) or buy an Airalo Europe eSIM (~$16/10GB). Both UK and France are covered by all options.

Travel insurance — consider a family policy — Venture X covers trip cancellation + lost bags but NOT medical expenses abroad. World Nomads or Allianz family plans ~$100-150 for 10 days. One ER visit without insurance could cost thousands with 2 kids.
Sky Garden (Jun 12) — book Mon May 25 at 5 AM CDT — Free. Released Mondays 10am London / 5am CDT. skygarden.london. Set alarm!
NHM timed entry (Jun 12) — book ~mid-May — Free. nhm.ac.uk. Michael + Louise day.
V&A Fashion Tour (Jun 10) — book closer to date — 12:30 PM slot. vam.ac.uk. ⚠ Only 25 min buffer to Matilda.
Book Uber to STL — Jun 7 departure — Schedule for ~7:00 PM pickup (flight departs 10 PM, arrive 2.5 hrs early). Book at earliest available date in Uber app. Cheaper than STL long-term parking.
Book Uber from STL — Jun 16 return — BA221 arrives STL 7:30 PM. Schedule pickup for ~8:15 PM (allow for customs/baggage). If you have Global Entry, you'll be out faster!
Download offline maps — Google Maps: download London, Paris, and Marne-la-Vallée/Disney area for offline use. Essential for navigation without burning through data.
Install + link all travel apps — Disneyland Paris app (link booking #32984124), Eurostar app (QRXPZK), BA app (YUAD5K), CityMapper (London transit — better than Google Maps for Tube).
Download Google Translate French pack — Settings → Offline Translation → French. Works without data for menus, signs, conversations.

Load iPads for kids — Louise: Meghan's iPad with downloaded movies/shows/games. Kenna: her own iPad. Download content for overnight BA flight (8 hrs) + Eurostar (3.5 hrs each way). Bring kid headphones!
Disney mobile check-in (opens Jun 7) — Disneyland Paris app → check in for booking #32984124. Gets your digital MagicPass ready. Meal vouchers + park tickets will appear here.

Kenna Oyster card — do at Paddington on arrival Jun 8 — Buy Oyster card (£7) at any Tube station. Ask staff to add Young Visitor discount (50% off, valid 14 days). Kenna must be present. Louise (5) rides FREE everywhere with adult.

Enable T-Mobile data roaming on both phones — Settings → Cellular → Data Roaming → ON. Phone will connect automatically when you land in London. If using a travel eSIM instead, install it before departure.

Carry-on only strategy (1 bag + 1 personal item per person) — BA allows 1 cabin bag (56×45×25cm) + 1 personal item per person. No checked bags = no waiting at baggage claim, no lost luggage risk, easier Eurostar/RER transfers. Pack light — you can do laundry at Travelodge if needed.
Charge Away luggage battery packs — Removable power packs must be charged. Keep them removable (required for flights). These + Anker adapters = charging sorted.

Prescriptions & first aid kit — Pack regular meds + copies of prescriptions. Bring: children's Tylenol/Motrin, anti-nausea, allergy meds (Benadryl/Zyrtec), band-aids, sunscreen (June sun is strong for Disney outdoor days).
Passports for all 4 — verify before leaving — Michael ✅, Meghan ✅, Louise ✅, Kenna ⚠️ (pending — follow up!). All 4 needed for BA flights, Eurostar, and UK ETA.

Disney PhotoPass+ (~€80) — decide before trip — Unlimited digital ride photos + photographer shots for your 2-day stay. Worth it if you want hands-free family photos at character dining, in front of the castle, on rides. Buy in app once tickets activate Jun 7.
Booking #32984124 — PAID IN FULL ($1,733.68) on March 19, 2026
